message:
Integrate comptime wrappers with runtime (Phase 3.2)

Replaced placeholders with actual runtime implementations:

MarshalPyToC improvements:
- PyInt → i64/i32/c_int extraction
- PyFloat → f64/f32 extraction
- NumpyArray → []f64 extraction
- PyString → []const u8 extraction
- Type checking and error handling

MarshalCToPy improvements:
- i64/i32 → PyInt wrapping
- f64/f32 → PyFloat wrapping
- []f64 → NumpyArray → PyObject wrapping
- []const u8 → PyString wrapping
- void → PyNone wrapping

Added comprehensive tests:
- ✅ marshal PyFloat to f64
- ✅ marshal f64 to PyFloat
- ✅ marshal PyInt to i64
- ✅ marshal NumpyArray to []f64
- ✅ comptime wrapper architecture

All 5 tests passing! Comptime utilities now fully functional
with real runtime types.

Next: Demonstrate generating 5+ NumPy functions in 5 minutes
